source: https://www.facebook.com/business/ads-guide/ + cross-checked against industry spec sheets (2026 updates)
source_notes: Meta's spec pages are robots.txt-disallowed for direct fetch; specs verified from multiple cross-referenced industry sources current as of May 2026. Refresh quarterly.
platform_notes: Instagram Explore feed retired January 2026 — traffic flows to Reels
Reels reached ~33% of Instagram impressions Q1 2026 (Tinuiti) — favour 9:16 vertical creative
Meta's Andromeda delivery system reads creative quality as a first-class ranking signal; resolution choices now affect auction performance
20% text rule is officially gone, but heavy text overlays still deprioritised by delivery algorithm

best_practice_notes: 4:5 (1080x1350) takes more screen real estate on mobile
Heavy text overlays still deprioritised algorithmically
Primary text truncates after ~125 chars on most placements

formats.audio: Stereo AAC at 128kbps+. Captions recommended (sound-off viewing common)

best_practice_notes: 4:5 (1080x1350) takes more screen real estate on mobile - higher CTR than 1:1
Heavy text overlays still deprioritised algorithmically despite 20% rule officially gone
Front-load key visual element - feed scroll is fast

formats.safe_zone: Leave top 14% (~250px) and bottom 20% (~340px) free of key elements (profile icon top, CTA button bottom). Keep critical content in central 1080x1420 band (y=250 to y=1670).

formats.audio: Required (Reels users watch with sound on more than Feed users)
formats.safe_zone: Leave top 14%, bottom 35%, and 6% on each side free from key elements. Native captions overlay bottom third — keep your text out of bottom 30%.
best_practice_notes: Native, organic-feeling content outperforms polished commercial cuts
Reels is the growing placement (33% of Instagram impressions Q1 2026)

formats.video_duration: 1 second to 4 minutes (6 or 15 seconds recommended)
best_practice_notes: Description char limit is 20 (not 30 like single image) - easy miss
First card is most-viewed - lead with hero
Mix of product cards and value-prop cards typically outperforms product-only
Native to video viewing context — 16:9 feels appropriate here
High purchase intent — ads should look like organic listings
Clean product photography, minimal text overlay

formats.note: Standalone scrollable Explore feed was retired January 2026. Explore Home (grid-tile layout) is still live.

compliance_notes: Special Ad Categories (Housing, Employment, Credit, Social Issues/Elections/Politics) trigger restricted targeting and review
Heavy text overlays on images may reduce reach (algorithmic, not policy-enforced)
